title: Grilled Kabanos and Mediterranean Vegetables with Fermented Tzatziki
description: A flavorful and refreshing dish featuring grilled kabanos, roasted Mediterranean vegetables, and a refreshing fermented tzatziki sauce.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Brush the kabanos with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the kabanos for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Meanwhile, toss the zucchini, bell pepper, and onion with olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Grill the vegetables for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender.
In a bowl, whisk together the yogurt, garlic, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt.
Stir in the diced cucumber and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Serve the grilled kabanos and vegetables with the fermented tzatziki sauce on the side.
